caption: A close-up view shows the mechanical components of a Polaris vehicle's engine and drivetrain. A brown exhaust pipe runs horizontally across the top of the scene, positioned above a complex assembly of metal parts, gears, and a drive chain. A metallic casing features the embossed "POLARIS" logo. A small white sticker with a barcode and the text "0010381039" is attached to a component near the center. A black metal frame bracket with a large silver bolt is visible in the foreground. The scene remains static across the frames, with no people present and no movement of the machinery or camera, maintaining a consistent focus on the oily, metallic surfaces of the engine assembly.
